changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Create continuous aggregate for hourly event timeline data
changeSet.sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW event_timeline_hourly WITH (timescaledb.continuous) AS SELECT channel_id, time_bucket('1 hour', timestamp) AS bucket, FIRST(severity, timestamp) AS first_severity, LAST(severity, timestamp) AS last_severity, COUNT(*) AS event_count, MIN(timestamp) AS first_event_time, MAX(timestamp) AS last_event_time FROM event GROUP BY channel_id, bucket;

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Add hourly refresh policy for event_timeline_hourly
changeSet.sql: SELECT add_continuous_aggregate_policy('event_timeline_hourly', start_offset => INTERVAL '7 days', end_offset => INTERVAL '1 hour', schedule_interval => INTERVAL '1 hour');

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Enable compression on event_timeline_hourly and add compression policy

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Add composite index for channel and time bucket queries
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_timeline_hourly_channel_bucket ON event_timeline_hourly (channel_id, bucket DESC);
